backstory.original: Ulder Ravengard is the leader of the Flaming Fist and the Grand Duke of Baldur's Gate. His primary concerns are the stability and prosperity of Baldur's Gate, and he's been a voice of reason and common sense among the ruling council. In recent years, he has been a target of fiendish plots in unsuccessful attempts to take over the city.
backstory.display: 乌尔德·瑞文嘉德是烈焰之拳的领袖，也是博德之门的公爵。他的首要关注点是博德之门的稳定和繁荣，并一直在执政委员会中充当理性与常识的代言人。近年来，炼狱生物曾多次企图占领城市但无功而返，而他是首当其冲的目标。

description.original: Duke Ravengard attacks the closest enemy for one hit with his longsword.
description.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵用他的剑攻击距离最近的敌人并命中一次。

description.original: Duke Ravengard ignites in flames for 20 seconds, damaging attacking melee enemies and increasing his damage.
description.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵燃烧 20 秒，对攻击他的近战敌人造成伤害，并提高他自身的伤害。

longDescription.original: Duke Ravengard's magical armor ignites in flames for 20 seconds, causing any attacking melee enemies to take damage as well as increasing his own damage.
longDescription.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵的魔法护甲燃烧 20 秒，使所有攻击他的近战敌人受到伤害，并提高他自身的伤害。

description.desc: Duke Ravengard's base chance to Critical Hit is $(amount)%.
瑞文嘉德公爵造成暴击的基础概率为 $(amount)%。

Duke Ravengard gains a Command stack for each Champion with a melee base attack in the formation (including himself). Each stack increases the damage of these Champions by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位以近战为基本攻击方式的勇士（包括他自己），瑞文嘉德公爵就获得一层命令堆叠。每层堆叠会提升这些勇士们 $(amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Duke Ravengard's support abilities grow stronger as you include more heroes that use melee attacks.
tipText.display: 阵型重使用近战攻击的勇士越多，瑞文嘉德公爵的辅助技能也就越强。

description.desc: Whenever a Champion with a melee base attack gets a critical hit, increase the effect of Marshal of the Flaming Fist by $(not_buffed amount)% and additively increase the odds of all Champions in the formation getting critical hits by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Both effects stack up to 50 times and reset when changing areas.

effect_keys.total_title: Total Marshal of the Flaming Fist Bonus

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Each time $target deals a Critical Hit, they contribute a Critical Teamwork stack to $(source_hero)

description.desc: 每当一名以近战为基本攻击的勇士打出暴击时，烈焰之拳元帅的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，并使阵型中所有勇士的暴击几率叠加提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。这两种效果最多堆叠 50 次，并在改变区域时重置。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 每次 $target 打出暴击时，都会为 $(source_hero) 施加一层致命合作

tipText.original: Duke Ravengard's support abilities grow stronger in an area each time a Champion scores a critical hit!
tipText.display: 每当一名勇士打出暴击时，在一个区域内瑞文嘉德公爵的辅助技能就会变得更强！

description.desc: 解锁$(source_hero)的“火焰护盾”杀招攻击

Duke Ravengard increases the effect of the outgoing positional formation abilities of all Champions with a melee base attack by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Command stack he has, stacking additively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the effect of $target's outgoing Positional Formation Abilities by $amount%

description.desc: 瑞文嘉德公爵使所有具备近战基本攻击的勇士提供的位置阵型技能的效果提高，每层命令堆叠提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使 $target 提供的位置阵型技能的效果提高 $amount%

description.desc: Duke Ravengard gains the Control role and when he gets a critical hit, he follows up by bashing the enemy with his shield, knocking it back a short distance. When this occurs, all melee Champions adjacent to Duke Ravengard have their base attack cooldowns immediately reset.
瑞文嘉德公爵获得控制者角色，当他受到暴击时，他会用盾牌猛击敌人，将其击退一段距离。出现这种情况时，与瑞文嘉德公爵相邻的所有近勇士军的基本攻击冷却时间会立即重置。

specializationDescription.original: Duke Ravengard leads the attack, causing his followers to attack more often.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵带头冲锋，激励他的追随者们增加攻击频率。

description.desc: Champions with a melee base attack have their crit chance additively increased by 20% and crit damage increased by 1000%.
拥有近战基本攻击的勇士，其暴击率以加算方式提高 20%，暴击伤害提高 1000%。

specializationDescription.original: Ulder shows the other Champions how to strike vulnerable points to deal more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 乌尔德向其他勇士们展示如何打击敌人弱点，造成更高伤害。

description.desc: If Wyll is in the formation, anyone affected by Wyll's Folk Hero benefit gains an additional stack, but the maximum remains at 4 stacks.
如果瓦尔在阵型中，任何受其“民间英雄”效果影响的人都会获得额外层数，但最大层数仍为 4。

specializationDescription.original: Ulder supports Wyll, making them a powerful force together.
specializationDescription.display: 乌尔德支援瓦尔，两人势不可挡。

description.original: Elturel may not be my city, but I will lay down my life to protect its people.
description.display: 艾尔托瑞尔也许不是我的城市，但我愿意舍命保护它的人民。

description.original: Show the fiends of Avernus what it means to be a Hellrider!
description.display: 让阿弗纳斯的炼狱生物们见识见识地狱骑士的风采！

description.original: We shall be the front line of defense against the forces of the Hells!
description.display: 我们将成为抵御地狱侵袭的最前线！

description.original: We are the last hope of Elturel.
description.display: 我们是艾尔托瑞尔最后的希望。

description.original: Knowing our strengths is how we will win.
There! Their formation is weakening - attack!
description.display: 那边！他们的阵型正在崩溃，快进攻！

description.original: This is it - victory is nearly at hand!
Let's show these cultists what it means to be a Baldurian!
description.display: 让这些信徒瞧瞧什么叫做真正的“博德人”！

description.original: This is what our soldiers needed - hope.
description.display: 我们的士兵正需要希望。

description.original: One person can change the entire battle.
description.display: 只要一个人，就能改变整场战局。

description.original: Let hope strengthen your blades and deliver us victory!
description.display: 让希望磨砺你的剑刃，带领我们走向胜利！

description.original: I... I had the strangest dream... Why does my head hurt?
description.display: 我……我做了一个非常奇怪的梦……我怎么头这么疼？

description.original: I always cherish my time in Candlekeep.
description.display: 我会永远怀念在烛堡度过的时光。

description.original: As Grand Duke, my morals are tested time and again. I must not lose myself.
description.display: 身为大公爵，我的道德一次又一次经受考验。我绝对不能迷失自我。

name.display: TBD Duke Ravengard Feat (Do not translate)
博德之门瑞文嘉德公爵

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ulder Ravengard is the leader of the Flaming Fist and the Grand Duke of Baldur's Gate. His primary concerns are the stability and prosperity of Baldur's Gate, and he's been a voice of reason and common sense among the ruling council. In recent years, he has been a target of fiendish plots in unsuccessful attempts to take over the city.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Duke Ravengard greatly supports Champions with Melee base attacks. His buffs are further increased in an area when any Melee Champion scores a critical hit.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 乌尔德·瑞文嘉德是烈焰之拳的领袖，也是博德之门的公爵。他的首要关注点是博德之门的稳定和繁荣，并一直在执政委员会中充当理性与常识的代言人。近年来，炼狱生物曾多次企图占领城市但无功而返，而他是首当其冲的目标。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 瑞文嘉德公爵能给拥有近战基本攻击的勇士提供很大助益。当任何近战勇士打出暴击时，他的增益会在一个区域内进一步得到增强。
